name: The Gate Pattern
description: The gate has a pattern lock! Look at the sequence of shapes and choose the correct one to complete the pattern.
learningFocus: Pattern recognition, completing sequences, logical deduction
hints: Look at the shapes in the row — do you notice anything repeating?
Try covering the last shape and just look at the ones before it. What comes next in the pattern?
The pattern goes: shape, shape, shape, shape... which of the three choices fits that rhythm?
failureMessage: Hmm, not quite that one — have another look at the pattern, you will get it!

reward.text: That is it! Now insert your three golden key pieces to open the gate. Adventure awaits beyond!
reward.worldCompleteMessage: You did it, Pip! The gate swings open! The Learning Village cheers for you. A whole world of adventure lies ahead!
